dialogueChunks.intro: Something terrible happened on the eastern road. One of our patrols attacked a group of travelers, killed two of them before anyone realized they were friendlies.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: The patrol had been stationed near {quest_origin} for weeks. When they came back, they looked wrong: skin too pale, eyes too wide. Nobody said anything because they still wore our colors. Now two innocent people are dead and the patrol doesn't even remember doing it.
dialogueChunks.outro: We need someone to {quest_action} before {quest_threat} claims more of our own. Those soldiers were good people once. Whatever changed them is still out there.

playerResponses.text: I'll find the source of this curse and put a stop to it.
Those soldiers need to be put down, not saved.
This isn't my problem to solve.

dialogueChunks.intro: My neighbor killed her own brother last night. She swears she saw a {enemy_type} standing where he stood. She wasn't lying: she truly saw a monster.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: It started three days ago when people began drinking from {quest_focus}. The water tasted fine but something in it twists perception. Friends look like enemies. Family looks like {enemy_type}. Two people are dead already, both killed by people who loved them.
dialogueChunks.outro: If we don't {quest_action} and find out what's contaminating the supply, {quest_stakes} will be gone by week's end. Please, {player_name}. We're turning on each other.

playerResponses.text: Show me the well. I'll find what's doing this.
Have you tried just... not drinking the water?
I can't risk being affected myself.

dialogueChunks.intro: We killed one of our own scouts two days ago. The guard captain swore the scout drew a weapon first. The scout's partner says he was reaching for his canteen.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: Something has been wearing the faces of our people. It takes {quest_focus} of someone trusted, walks among us, then does something violent enough to provoke a response. When the real person shows up later, they walk into a crossbow bolt meant for a monster. We've lost three people this way.
dialogueChunks.outro: We need someone from outside our ranks to {quest_action}. Everyone here suspects everyone else already. {quest_time_pressure}: we'll destroy ourselves without any enemy lifting a finger.

playerResponses.text: An outsider's eyes might see what yours can't. I'll help.
How do I know you're not the shapeshifter?
